leadText: Butter (Japanese: バター Butter) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A condiment that unites salty and sweet and also packs a richness that makes bread a delight to eat. The finest butter products are made of 100 percent Moomoo Milk.

sections.title: In the core series games

The finest butter products are made of 100 percent Moomoo Milk.
